protocol_notes: Comment provides general dosing guidance for trials (maintenance max 12mg/wk, starting schedule 0.5mg wk1, 1mg wk2, adding 1mg/wk thereafter). Mentions reconstitution example: 10mg vial with 1ml bac water yields 1mg per 10 units on 1ml syringe. References split dosing (once weekly vs twice weekly). No personal usage described.
